name: Fionnuala O'Shaughnessy
summary: Detail-oriented Technical Writer with five years of experience creating comprehensive documentation for complex SaaS platforms. Proven track record in translating intricate technical concepts into user-friendly guides and API references to improve developer adoption.

experience.title: Technical Writer
experience.description: Lead documentation efforts for cloud infrastructure APIs, maintaining a library of over 200 articles and tutorials. Collaborated with engineering teams to document new feature releases and deprecation cycles.

experience.title: Junior Technical Writer
experience.description: Authored internal knowledge base articles and user manuals for financial software. Assisted in the migration of legacy documentation to a modern Markdown-based static site generator.

experience.title: Content Coordinator
experience.description: Managed editorial calendars and performed quality assurance on technical blog posts and white papers for various technology clients.

education.degree: B.A. in English and Computer Science
